revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: fix "|=foo" bug; rm unnecessary substitution check
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Underlinked}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Underlinked | type = style | image = [[File:Ambox wikify.svg|50x40px|link=|alt=]] | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''needs more [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking|links to other articles]] to help [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking#Principles|integrate it into the encyclopedia]]'''. | fix = Please help [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve this article] by adding links [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking#Overlinking and underlinking|that are relevant to the context]] within the existing text. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles with too few wikilinks | all = All articles with too few wikilinks | cat2 = Articles covered by WikiProject Wikify | all2 = All articles covered by WikiProject Wikify }}<!--{{Underlinked}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
